auro-form Testing

First Name

Cool Fact

Checkboxes

Select your interests Sports Music Reading Travel

Radio Buttons

Select your favorite season

Select Dropdown

Select your country United States Canada Mexico United Kingdom France Germany

Combobox

Select or type a fruit Apples Oranges Peaches Grapes Cherries Bananas No matching option

Counter Group

Adults (18+) Children (2-17) Infants (under 2)

Date Picker

Choose a date Choose a date

Date Range Picker

Start End Choose a range
Reset Submit
